---
title: "Blog"
description: "Lukas Mayer's personal blog - tech tips, life-style recommendations, software development, research, data science"
listing:
  id: main-listing
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [image, date, title, description, reading-time]
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: [title, date]
  filter-ui: [title, date]
  categories: true
  feed: true
  page-size: 4
format: 
  html:
    toc: false
---

<style>
.description {
    display: none;
}
</style>


<script>

// Move categories to the sidebar once the DOM is fully loaded
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
    // Find the element containing the categories
    var categoryContent = document.querySelector("#quarto-margin-sidebar");

    // Find the sidebar where we want to move the categories
    var sidebar = document.querySelector("#quarto-sidebar");

    // Move the content to the sidebar without changing any positioning
    if (categoryContent && sidebar) {
        sidebar.appendChild(categoryContent);

        // Ensure no additional styles are applied that affect the layout
        categoryContent.style.position = "static"; // Keep it in normal flow
        categoryContent.style.transition = "none"; // Disable any transitions
    }
});


</script>


{{< animate zoomIn "A dedicated space for me to rant!" duration=2s >}}


:::{#main-listing}
:::

Follow my blog with RSS
<a href="blog_index.xml" target="_blank">
    <i class="bi bi-rss"></i>
</a>


<script>
const paginationContainer = document.querySelector('#main-listing-pagination');
const listingMain = document.querySelector('#listing-main-listing');

if (paginationContainer && listingMain) {
  paginationContainer.addEventListener('click', function(event) {
    const target = event.target;

    if (target.tagName === 'A' && target.classList.contains('page-link')) {
      event.preventDefault();

      const pageIndex = parseInt(target.dataset.i, 10); // Get the page index from the button
      console.log("Pagination button clicked. Index:", pageIndex);

      if (listingMain) {
        console.log("Fading out the current listing content.");
        listingMain.style.transition = 'opacity 0.5s ease';
        listingMain.style.opacity = '0';

        setTimeout(function() {
          console.log("Fadeout complete. Updating content...");

          // Show posts for the selected page and hide others
          showPostsForPage(pageIndex);

          listingMain.style.transition = 'opacity 1s ease';
          listingMain.style.opacity = '1';
          console.log("New content loaded. Fading in the updated listing content.");

        }, 500); // Adjust this timing to match the fadeout duration
      }
    }
  });

  console.log("Pagination script loaded and event listeners attached to pagination container.");
}

// Function to show posts for the selected page and hide others
function showPostsForPage(pageIndex) {
  const postsPerPage = 4;
  const start = (pageIndex - 1) * postsPerPage;
  const end = start + postsPerPage;

  // Select all post elements
  const posts = document.querySelectorAll('.g-col-1');

  // Hide all posts first
  posts.forEach((post) => {
    post.style.display = 'none';
  });

  // Loop through all posts and display only those in the current page range
  posts.forEach((post) => {
    const postIndex = parseInt(post.getAttribute('data-index'), 10);
    if (postIndex >= start && postIndex < end) {
      post.style.display = 'block';  // Show posts for the current page
    }
  });

  console.log(`Displayed posts for page ${pageIndex}`);
}


</script>
